publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2024-11-07 23:59:37 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Collections contains papers documenting the research and teaching of Gesa Valk. Includes material on German Expressionism and Georg Kaiser, sculptur and printmaker Ernst Barlach, and author Ludwig Harig. Also some items relating to Wolfgang Paulsen.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Gesa Valk papers, #14-18-4513. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: In 1972 Gesa Valk earned a PhD in German Studies and Comparative Literature from Cornell, and was a senior lecturer there until 2001. For 30 years she pursued her research interest, which was the life of Georg Kaiser, a German Expressionist playwright. Gesa is the author of numerous publications and was known as the foremost authority on Georg Kaiser.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Student rosters, records containing sensitive health information, and employment records weeded.

did.unittitle: The Ambivalence (of East Germans Towards the Question of Reunification)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chiefly cards and letters from students.

did.unittitle: Lohnversicherung ein neues Angebot für Deutschlands Arbeitslose: Gary Burtless, Horst Schäfer

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newspaper clippings, short stories by Eva Wright, etc.

did.unittitle: Series II. Research materials, notes, and drafts
Subseries IIa. Georg Kaiser and Maria von Mühlfeld
Archival research notes -- Akademie der Künste, Robert Koch Platz, Berlin
Exposé (Entwurf zu Georg Kaiser (1878-1945): Leben und Werk im Bild)
Ein Ganzes Leben im Schatten Teil 1
Ein Ganzes Leben im Schatten, Gesa M. Valk
Ein Ganzes Leben im Schatten, Maria von Mühlfeld
Ein Ganzes Leben im SchattenManuskript Briefe M v M Teil II

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies. Includes letter from Gustav Kiepenheuer Verlag.

did.unittitle: Die Heimliche Familie: Maria und Olivia von Mühlfeld mit Georg Kaiser im Schweizer Exil
Julius Marx draft, Teil II, Kaptial 4

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Der Ehrenvolle Konkubine. Maria von Mühlfeld über Georg Kaiser: Briefe an Julius Marx -- Schweiz 1938-1945"

did.unittitle: Letters from Georg Kaiser to his wife Margarethe
Manuskript Briefe -- M v M an JM (+1 MK)
MvM, OvM (Maria and Olivia von Mühlfeld) an (Julius) Marx, Königsgarten
Roland Bärwinkel Georg Kaisers Leben am Horn 15

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Der Ehrenvolle Konkubine. Maria von Mühlfeld über Georg Kaiser: Briefe an Julius Marx -- Schweiz 1938-1945"

did.unittitle: Unterlagen Maria von Mühlfeld 1896 (27. VI)-1947 (14. VIII)
Valk's "Georg Kaiser" and "Ein Ganzes Leben im Schatten" by Maria von Mühlfeld
Zeitum Probizen zum Prozess MvM an Marx, Albrecht Brief Verträge
"Zweitausend Meter über Dem Menschenspiegel": Georg Kaiser in St. Moritz. Gesa M. Valk, Akademie Presse (Medien)
Ludwig Harig "Texanishes Tagebuch" Manuskript (Photcopie getrippt & fertige Texte)
Portrait of Barlach by one of Valk's students

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a copy of Valk's "Georg Kaiser in Grünheide (Mark) 1921-1938" (1993) (folder 4), "Ansätze zu einer Biographie" in 49: Georg Kaiser Herausgegeben von Armin Arnold (undated) (folder 5).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All programs include essays by Valk.

did.unittitle: Ort der Handlung in den Dramen Ernest Barclachs. Untersuchungen zum nicht-verbalen im Drama (Valk's PhD thesis)
